title: Device Request - [Device name] - [manufacturerName] / [modelId]
excerpt:
### Prerequisites:

- Before requesting a device addition, please ensure there is not already a request for the device among the open issues.
- Make sure your Homey is upgraded to firmware v5 or higher.
- You need a physical example of the device.

### Device Information

- Device Name: 'Tuya Zigbee 3-gang wall switch`
- Device Model: `TS0013`
- Manufacturer Name: _TYZB01_4lwqwyqn
- Device Description: `Pairs as Generic Zigbee and only exposes 1 switch; should expose 3 gangs/endpoints.`
- Link to device image: (https://www.ozsmartthings.com.au/products/matter-triple-light-switch-white), the zigbee switch is no longer for sale, but the device looks the same as this version

### Additional Information:
- **Prerequisites**:
  - Ensure there is not already a request for the device among the open issues.
  - Homey must be upgraded to firmware v5 or higher.
  - A physical example of the device is required.

This structured format should help in organizing and understanding the device information more effectively.
